modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.

full_description_text:

The table currently has no alt. text.  
This is causing accessibility issues.  
User needs help with this task.
